Off Calendar Aug-26-2025 Continued To Nov-18-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
The following matters were heard: PTR-25-308528 In Re: Durable Power of Attorney of Inja Wang and PTR-25-308530 Jung T. Wang Family Trust.

Appearances: Steven Braccini and David Berger for and with Jane Park and Victor Wang (Petitioners).
Kathleen Durrans for and with Debra Dolch (Interim Successor).
Michael Schreiber and Konstantine Demiris appeared for and with Walter Wang (Attorney in Fact).

Discussion was held regarding a request for evidentiary hearing, that they need to conduct discovery, that the ex parte matters are deeply problematic, that there may have been un-due influence referring to elder abuse, and the possibility of pursing a better loan.

Parties' oral requests were denied without prejudice.

All matters are continued to November 18, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Maloney. Reported by, Miles Lendway, CSR 13684, 925-640-4915.
